items.why_it_matters: 具体场景会把搬家对话从泛咨询推进到真实预约筹备。
items.echoer_action: Use the scene signal to guide toward timing, room scope, and store details.

items.why_it_matters: 房型和范围可以快速帮助 Echoer 收窄承接路线和预约方式。
items.echoer_action: Anchor the reply in the home scope and gather any scene details still missing.

items.why_it_matters: 时间窗口会显著影响排班和承接方式。
items.echoer_action: Use the timing to move toward booking or scheduling details.

items.why_it_matters: 赔付与加价担忧说明用户并非随便看看，而是把信任当作成交前提。
items.echoer_action: Use evidence-first language and avoid hard-sell replies.

items.why_it_matters: 范围与加项有助于 Echoer 区分轻搬运与高客单场景。
items.echoer_action: Shift larger-scope cases toward qualified routing quickly.

trigger_patterns: must come today no matter what
items.why_it_matters: 绝对化期待如果不及时降温，容易形成履约和售后风险。
items.echoer_action: Stabilize the tone, restate evidence and real boundary conditions.
